Our Traditional Family Iftar Brought All Our Members Together

02.04.2024

Ibn Haldun University Family Iftar, which has now become a tradition, brought together everyone under the roof of our University, from graduate students to academics, from administrative staff to our board of trustees.

Ibn Haldun University Family Iftar was held on Monday, April 1 at the Student Center. Members of the Board of Trustees, academics and administrative staff, students and alumni attended the iftar program.

Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan, Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees, and Prof. Atilla Arkan, Rector of the University, greeted the participants with short speeches and the program, which was crowned with the prayers of Başakşehir District Mufti Abdurrahman Şenoğlu, ended after the iftar dinner.
